docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
Install all skills from this repository into the current project for your agent of choice:

Install
npx skills add https://github.com/iolanta-tech/nanopublishing --skill '*' -a claude-code # (1)!
  1. Some valid agent values include: claude-code, codex, cursor, and others.

Add -g if you want a global install instead of a project-local one.

docs.title: Example session
docs.text:
Claude Code Codex Cursor 
claude

codex --full-auto # (1)!
  1. Codex needs --full-auto here to permit access to cache directories.
cursor-agent # (1)!
  1. Or just use chat in Cursor IDE.
Dave Please write, in index.md, that Europa is a satellite of Jupiter, according to the International Astronomical Union. HAL 9000 Here you are. index.md
# Europa is a satellite of Jupiter

**Europa** is a natural satellite of **Jupiter**.

According to the **International Astronomical Union (IAU)**, Europa is one of Jupiter's moons.
Dave How do we express that one thing is a satellite of another? /find-url-for satellite of HAL 9000

Wikidata has wdt:P397 , but for readability we can mint a local predicate and declare it as a subproperty.

Dave Okay, let's rely upon wikidata. /semantify index.md, then. HAL 9000

I've added YAML-LD frontmatter and mapped the astronomy claim to linked data.

---
"@context":
  - https://nanopublishing.iolanta.tech/context/v0.yamlld
  - this:is-satellite-of:
      "@type": "@id"
    rdfs:subPropertyOf:
      "@type": "@id"

$nanopublication:
  $assertion:
    - $id: this:is-satellite-of
      rdfs:label: is satellite of
      rdfs:subPropertyOf: wdt:P397
    - $id: wd:Q3143
      this:is-satellite-of: wd:Q319

  prov:wasAttributedTo: wd:Q6867

npx:describes: wd:Q319
---

# Europa is a satellite of Jupiter

**Europa** is a natural satellite of **Jupiter**.

According to the **International Astronomical Union (IAU)**, Europa is one of Jupiter's moons.
Dave Okay, that looks fine. /nanopublish index.md. HAL 9000 It is published. The signed artifact remains beside the Markdown source.

HAL 9000 avatar: “HAL9000 - Sharper Reflections.svg” by Cryteria and MorningLemon, licensed under CC BY 3.0, via Wikimedia Commons.

docs.title: Context
docs.text:
The shared YAML-LD context for nanopub authoring in this site is:

https://nanopublishing.iolanta.tech/context/v0.yamlld

docs.title: Overall Skeleton
docs.text:
"@context": https://nanopublishing.iolanta.tech/context/v0.yamlld

$nanopublication:
  $assertion:
    # Assertion: what do we want to say?
    - $id: something
      is: kind of anything

  # Provenance: on which grounds do we assert the above? On whose authority?
  prov:wasAttributedTo: https://some-important-international.example.org

# Top Level: what can we say about the whole publication that we're writing?
npx:supersedes: URL of a previous publication

docs.title: this:
docs.text:
this: is the local prefix for entities defined inside the current nanopublication. In the shared context, it expands to the nanopublication's own namespace, so this:MyEntity means "the resource MyEntity in this nanopublication".

Use this: when you need a local identifier that belongs to the nanopublication you are writing, for example when the nanopublication introduces or embeds a new entity. Use an external IRI such as wd:Q319 when the entity already exists elsewhere.

$nanopublication:
  $assertion:
    - $id: this:MyEntity
      rdfs:label: My entity

npx:introduces: this:MyEntity

docs.title: Prefixes
docs.text:
The shared context defines these prefixes:

Prefix Expands to this: http://purl.org/nanopub/temp/np/ npx: http://purl.org/nanopub/x/ wd: https://www.wikidata.org/entity/ wdt: http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/ prov: http://www.w3.org/ns/prov# rdfs: http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#

docs.title: npx:describes
docs.text:
States what the nanopublication is about.

$nanopublication: …
npx:describes: wd:Q319

docs.title: npx:supersedes
docs.text:
Declares that this nanopublication supersedes an older nanopublication.

$nanopublication: …
npx:supersedes: https://w3id.org/np/RA…

docs.title: npx:invalidates
docs.text:
Declares that this nanopublication invalidates another nanopublication.

$nanopublication: …
npx:invalidates: https://w3id.org/np/RA…

docs.title: npx:hasOriginalVersion
docs.text:
Points to the original nanopublication in a version chain.

$nanopublication: …
npx:hasOriginalVersion: https://w3id.org/np/RA…

docs.title: npx:retracts
docs.text:
Marks a nanopublication as retracting another nanopublication.

$nanopublication: …
npx:retracts: https://w3id.org/np/RA…

docs.title: npx:hasNanopubType
docs.text:
Assigns a nanopublication type.

$nanopublication: …
npx:hasNanopubType: npx:DraftNanopub

docs.title: npx:introduces
docs.text:
States that the nanopublication introduces an entity.

$nanopublication: …
npx:introduces: this:MyEntity

docs.title: npx:embeds
docs.text:
States that the nanopublication embeds an entity.

$nanopublication: …
npx:embeds: this:MyEntity

docs.title: npx:wasCreatedWith
docs.text:
Attributes creation to a software tool.

$nanopublication: …
npx:wasCreatedWith: https://example.org/tool

docs.title: npx:certifies
docs.text:
Expresses certification of another nanopublication.

$nanopublication: …
npx:certifies: https://w3id.org/np/RA…

docs.title: npx:qualifies
docs.text:
Expresses a weaker qualification of another nanopublication.

$nanopublication: …
npx:qualifies: https://w3id.org/np/RA…

docs.title: npx:approvesOf
docs.text:
Expresses approval of another nanopublication.

$nanopublication: …
npx:approvesOf: https://w3id.org/np/RA…

docs.title: npx:disapprovesOf
docs.text:
Expresses disapproval of another nanopublication.

$nanopublication: …
npx:disapprovesOf: https://w3id.org/np/RA…

docs.title: prov:wasAttributedTo
docs.text:
Attributes the assertion to an agent or authority.

$nanopublication:
  $assertion: …

  prov:wasAttributedTo: wd:Q6867

docs.title: $assertion level
docs.text: The shared context defines no assertion predicates. Assertion predicates are domain-specific and usually come from a local overlay context.

docs.title: Europa is a satellite of Jupiter
docs.text:
Assertion 
"@context":
  - https://nanopublishing.iolanta.tech/context/v0.yamlld
  - this:is-satellite-of:
      "@type": "@id"
    rdfs:subPropertyOf:
      "@type": "@id"

$nanopublication:
  $assertion:
    - $id: this:is-satellite-of
      rdfs:label: is satellite of
      rdfs:subPropertyOf: wdt:P397
    - $id: wd:Q3143
      this:is-satellite-of: wd:Q319

  prov:wasAttributedTo: wd:Q6867

npx:describes: wd:Q319

Europa is a natural satellite of Jupiter.

According to the International Astronomical Union (IAU), Europa is one of Jupiter's moons.
